scripts.setup:windows: cd apps/backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:linux: cd apps/backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev:windows: concurrently "bun --cwd apps/frontend dev" "cd apps/backend && .venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.dev:linux: concurrently "bun --cwd apps/frontend dev" "cd apps/backend && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.start:windows: bun run build && concurrently "bun --cwd apps/frontend start" "cd apps/backend && .venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.start:linux: bun run build && concurrently "bun --cwd apps/frontend start" "cd apps/backend && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
